channel.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Firebase Extensions

  • 🔧 Firebase Extension for Full-Text Searchstars19 - Extension to add full-text search in Firestore, by syncing the data to Typesensestars5.5k - an OSS alternative to Algolia.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 Firefoo - Cloud Firestore GUI Admin Tool with JSON/CSV Export and JavaScript Query Shell.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
CLI & Editor

  • 📝 Refi App - A GUI tool to make developers less painful when interacting with Firestore DB

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Dec 7th - Dec 13th, 2020
item.description:
Featured (new releases)

  • 🔌 GeoFirestorestars442 - Location-based querying and filtering using Firebase Firestore.

    • Web

  • 🔌 Firestore Litestars190 - Lightweight Cloud Firestore library for the browser.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Server-side (Cloud Functions, BigQuery etc)

  • 💡 Express Server on Cloud Functions - Host an Express server on Cloud Functions.
  • 💡 Compiled Code with Cloud Functions - Compile your Flow, TypeScript or ReasonML to the correct Node runtime using Babel, TypeScript Compiler or ParcelJS.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020
item.description:
Featured (new releases)

  • 📹 Firebase Summit 2020 - All Firebase talks @ the Firebase Summit 2020.

    • CLI & Editor

  • 📖 Firebase Tools UIstars133 - Web UI for Firebase Emulator Suite.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Featured (new releases)

  • 🔊 The Firebase Podcast - This is the place where we dive deep into Firebase products and learn new tips and tricks along the way.
  • 🔌 Pyrebasestars1.6k - A simple python wrapper for the Firebase API.

    • Web

  • 🔌 SvelteFirestars457 - Cybernetically enhanced Firebase apps.
  • 🔧 Remote Styles with Remote Configstars61 - Dynamic/Conditional loading of CSS stored in Remote Config. (Launch post).

    • Other

  • 📹 Firebase Live 2020 - Firebase Live is a web series for app developers consisting of talks, tips, and technical tutorials aimed at increasing their productivity, knowledge, and collaboration.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2020
item.description:
Follow

Community

  • 🔥 Firebase Developers Discord - an open community dedicated to Firebase and its services, where you can to socialize and help other web and app developers from around the world.

    • Firebase Extensions

  • 🔧 Stripe Firebase Extensionsstars154 - Official Stripe subscriptions and invoices extensions.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Sep 7th - Sep 13th, 2020
item.description:
CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 Firecodestars28 - VS Code Firestore Rules Extension.
  • 🔧 VSFirestars71 - Deprecated VSCode extension for syntax highlighting & code completions with Firestore security rules & indexes.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020
item.description:
Mobile

  • 🔌 Flamingostars103 - A Firebase Firestore model framework for Dart.

    • Other

  • 🔧 Flankstars526 - Massively parallel Android and iOS test runner for Firebase Test Lab.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2020
item.description:
Mobile

  • 🔌 FlutterFirestars5.1k - Collection of Firebase plugins for Flutter apps.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2020
item.description:
Web

  • 🔌 firebase-kotlin-sdkstars241 - Kotlin-first SDK for Firebase supporting multiplatform projects (ios, android & js).

    • CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 Firetablestars1.2k - Excel/Google Sheets like UI for Firebase/Firestore. No more admin portals!

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Firebase Extensions

  • 🔧 Firebase Extensions - Firebase Extensions provide extended functionality to your apps without the need to research, write, or debug code on your own.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2020
item.description:
Web

  • 🔧 Typesaurusstars244 - Type-safe TypeScript-first ODM for Firestore.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Apr 13th - Apr 19th, 2020
item.description:
Official Docs & Quickstarts

  • 📖 Firebase for Games - New Firebase for Games landing page with links to Firebase/Google resources for game developers.

    • Games

  • 📖 Firestore for C++ and Unity - C++ and Unity SDKs for C++ and Unity (with Firebase Unity SDKs available via Unity Package Manager).

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2020
item.description:
Mobile

  • 🔧 Firebase App Distribution - Distribute pre-release versions of your app to your trusted testers.

    • Mobile

    Android

  • 🔌 Firecoilstars15 - Load images from GCS in your Android app using the image loading library Coil.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Mar 16th - Mar 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Featured (new releases)

  • 🔧 asdf-firebasestars4 - An asdf-vm plugin for firebase-tools. Manage your Firebase CLI without Node.js or npm! Great for python, golang, c++ & java Firebase projects.

    • CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 Svarogstars31 - Cloud Firestore schema validation with JSON Schema generated Security Rule helper functions.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Other

  • 🔌 Firestore Query Browser - WebApp to Query, (Batch-)Edit & Export documents with app & user switching.
  • 📹 Firebase Summit 2019 - All Firebase talks @ the Firebase Summit 2019.

    • Web

  • 🔌 React Firestars2.5k - Official Firebase React library with Hooks, Context Providers, and Components that make it easy to interact with Firebase.

item.title: jthegedus/awesome-firebase Oct 7th - Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Web

  • 🔌 React Firebase Hooksstars1.8k - React Hooks for Firebase services.
  • 🔌 Firebase UIstars3.5k - FirebaseUI is an open-source JavaScript library for Web that provides simple, customizable UI bindings on top of Firebase SDKs to eliminate boilerplate code and promote best practices.
  • 🔌 Firebase UI for Reactstars927 - React Wrapper for firebaseUI Web.
  • 🔌 GeoFire for JavaScriptstars1.3k - Realtime location queries with Firebase.
  • 💡 FirePadstars3.6k - Collaborative Text Editor Powered by Firebase.
  • 🔌 Ember Firestars692 - Official Ember data adapter for Firebase.
  • 🔌 Firebase Dartstars383 - Dart wrapper for Firebase.
  • 🔌 PolymerFirestars469 - Polymer Web Components for Firebase.
  • 🔌 VueFirestars3.1k - Firebase bindings for Vue.js.
  • 🔌 Angular Fire 2stars6.7k - Official library for Firebase and Angular.
  • 🔌 Re-basestars2.2k - Relay inspired library for building React.js + Firebase applications.
  • 🔌 React Redux Firebasestars2.5k - Redux bindings for Firebase. Includes Higher Order Component for use with React.
  • 🔌 GatsbyJS Firebase Data Source - Query your Firebase data right into your statically generated pages with Gatsby.
  • 🔌 Apollo Link Firebasestars416 - Provides a local GraphQL interface to RealtimeDB. DB syncs locally to device, Apollo Link provides querying into the local DB.
  • 🔌 BuckleScript Bindings for Firebasestars43 - BuckleScript bindings for Firebase for use in ReasonML projects.
  • 💡 Angular Firebase PWAstars837 - Is an Angular PWA powered by Firebase. It can serve as a foundation to learn this stack and roll out more complex features.
  • 🔌 FireSQLstars309 - Query Firestore using SQL syntax. Issues the minimum amount of queries necessary in order to get the data that you request.
  • 📖 Hosting Version History - Automatic deletion of older versions of your site deployments.
  • 🔌 Firestorterstars339 - Use Firestore in React with zero effort, using MobX (also for react-native).
  • 💡 Nextbasestars14 - Boilerplate of Next.js, Redux & Firebase for developers who want a quick start project.

    • CLI & Editor

  • 🔧 VSCode Firebase Explorerstars111 - Explore and manage your Firebase projects.
  • 🔧 Firebase Toolsstars3k - The Firebase Command Line Tools.
  • 🔧 Firebase CIstars66 - Simplified Firebase interaction for continuous integration.
  • 🔧 Firebase Firestore Snippetsstars13 - Contains the snippet for both Firebase and Firestore in VS Code editor.
  • 🔧 Fuegostars115 - Firestore client CLI supporting document add/update/query with filtering and pagination.
  • 🔧 Firestore Rules Generatorstars179 - Official (but experimental) Firebase Rules Generator for Cloud Firestore based on Google's Protocol Buffer format.
  • 🔧 Firepitstars25 - Firepit is a standalone, portable version of the Firebase CLI which has no depedencies (including Node.js).
  • 🔧 Firewardstars183 - Easy to use language for Firestore rules, similar to Firebase Bolt.

    • Official Docs & Quickstarts

  • 📖 Firebase Documentation - Official Firebase Documentation.
  • 🔧 Firebase Status Dashboard - This page provides status information on the services that are part of Firebase.
  • 💡 Firebase Quickstarts - Official Firebase Quickstarts.
  • 💡 Google Codelabs | Firebase - Google Developers Codelabs provide a guided, tutorial, hands-on coding experience.

    • Mobile

  • 📖 Firebase Flutter Documentation - Official Firebase Flutter Setup.
  • 🔌 NativeScript plugin Firebasestars1k - NativeScript plugin for Firebase.
  • 🔌 React Native Firebasestars9k - Well-tested feature rich modular Firebase implementation for React Native. Supports both iOS & Android platforms.
  • 🔌 React Native Firebase Cloud Messagingstars1.7k - React Native module for Firebase Cloud Messaging and local notification.
  • 💡 Expo Native Firebasestars197 - Native Firebase Expo App (iOS, Android) Demo for Firestore, Notifications, Analytics, Storage, Messaging, Database.
  • 💡 Flutter Calendar Appstars63 - New Flutter application implementing a simple mobile calendar app for storing basic events into Firebase cloud database.

    • Mobile

    Android

  • 🔌 GeoFire for Javastars663 - Realtime location queries with Firebase.
  • 🔌 Firebase UIstars4.2k - Optimized UI components for Firebase.
  • 🔌 FireXtensionsstars30 - Unofficial Kotlin Extensions for the Firebase Android SDK.

    • Mobile

    iOS

  • 🔌 GeoFire for Objective-Cstars421 - Realtime location queries with Firebase.
  • 🔌 Firebase UIstars1.3k - iOS UI bindings for Firebase.
  • 💡 MLKit - ARCorestars9 - Example detecting objects and tags them with 3D labels in Augmented Reality. Uses Firebase ML Kit, ARCore and Firebase RTDB.
  • 💡 MLKit - ARKitstars28 - Example detecting objects using Firebase ML Kit and tags them with 3D labels in Augmented Reality.

    • Server-side (Cloud Functions, BigQuery etc)

  • 📖 Firebase Admin Documentation - Official Firebase Admin SDK Server Setup.
  • 💡 Functions Samplesstars9.9k - Collection of sample apps showcasing popular use cases using Cloud Functions for Firebase.
  • 📝 GraphQL Server on Cloud Functions - Host an Express server with GraphQL middleware on Cloud Functions.
  • 📝 BigQuery & Google Analytics - How Do I Create a Closed Funnel in Google Analytics for Firebase Using BigQuery.

    • Other

  • 🔌 FireDrillstars41 - Find, Edit, Add, Remove, Import, Export, and Report on your Firebase data.
  • 💡 Unity Solutionsstars99 - Use Firebase tools to incorporate common features into your games.
  • 🔌 Firebase AIR Native Extensionstars56 - Firebase ANE collection give you access to the Google Firebase project in your AdobeAir projects supported on both Android and iOS with 100% identical ActionScript API.
  • 🔌 QtFirebasestars218 - An effort to bring Google's Firebase C++ API to Qt + QML.
  • 📝 StackBlitz to Firebase Hosting Deployments - StackBlitz (online code editor) to Firebase Hosting static deployments.
  • 🔧 Flamelink - CMS for Firebase. Supports Firestore, RealtimeDatabase & Storage.
  • 🔧 Canner CMSstars2.5k - CMS for developers supporting data sources such as Firebase/Firestore, GraphQL and Restful APIs.
  • 📹 Firebase Summit 2018 - All Firebase Summit 2018 talks.
  • 📹 Firebase @ Google Cloud Next '18 - All Firebase talks @ Google Cloud Next 2018.
  • 📹 Firebase @ Google IO '18 - All Firebase talks @ Google IO 2018.
  • 📹 #AskFirebase YouTube Playlist - Official #AskFirebase playlist on YouTube.
  • 📝 State of Firebase (mid 2019) - Cloud Next & Google I/O 2019 updates!
  • 📹 Firebase @ Google IO '19 - All Firebase talks @ Google IO 2019.

    • Follow

    Community

  • 📹 Fireship - AngularFirebase
  • 📹 ru @firebase_ru - Telegram friendly chat
